episodes.title: Amarillo’s in the Epstein files
episodes.description:
Amarillo has been mentioned in the Epstein Files. Join Ten Investigates Team as they uncover the documentation and follow the trail that hits close to home.

For more Local News from KFDA: https://www.newschannel10.com/
For more YouTube Content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDYiL8zLKtiaHZZElPfx6CA
